utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: It took me 28 years to find one man that I wanna spend my life with , if I have to wait another 28 years then , I will be 56 before I can have a baby , and that is just stupid .

emotion_cause.span: 1_It took me 28 years to find one man that I wanna spend my life with , if I have to wait another 28 years then , I will be 56 before I can have a baby , and that is just stupid .

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: I do not need an actual man , just a couple of his best swimmers .

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: And there , there are places you can go to get that stuff .
